description: Gold benchmark for the ragproject retriever, scored against the real chunks in the live Postgres store. Each query lists the industry it targets and the substring(s) that mark a relevant chunk (gold_needles); the runner resolves those to the gold chunk ids and scores whether retrieval surfaced them.

queries.query: How much did U.S. private AI investment reach in 2025?
gold_needles: U.S. private AI investment reached $285.9 billion in 2025

queries.query: How many documented AI incidents were there, and how many were there in 2024?
gold_needles: Documented AI incidents rose to 362, up from 233 in 2024

queries.query: How many times fewer parameters does OLMo 3.1 Think 32B have compared to Grok 4?
gold_needles: OLMo 3.1 Think 32B, with nearly 90 times fewer parameters than Grok 4

queries.query: What was global AI compute capacity in H100-equivalents?
How many tons of CO2 equivalent did training Grok 4 in 2025 produce?
gold_needles: training Grok 4 in 2025 produced about 72,816 tons

queries.query: How many AI-related GitHub projects were there in 2025?
gold_needles: increased from 1,549 in 2011 to approximately 5.6 million in 2025

queries.query: How much in US life insurance policies could be surrendered with low penalty, according to Moody's?
gold_needles: estimated that $500 billion (almost one-third of US life insurance policies) could be surrendered with low penalty

queries.query: By how much, in dollars and percent, did the reported metric increase from a year ago?
gold_needles: $1.2 billion (7.8 percent) higher than a year ago

queries.query: What did the community bank efficiency ratio rise to, and by how many basis points?
gold_needles: rose 95 basis points from one quarter ago to 63.8 percent

queries.query: How much did 1-4 family residential real estate loans increase from the prior quarter?
gold_needles: family residential real estate loans ($11.1 billion, or 2.3 percent)

queries.query: How much did noninterest expense increase from the prior quarter?
gold_needles: Noninterest expense increased $647.9 million (3.9 percent) from a quarter ago

queries.query: What were total unrealized losses on securities?
gold_needles: Unrealized losses on securities totaled $56.0 billion in first

queries.query: What did US semiconductor company sales total in 2020?
gold_needles: US semiconductor company sales totaled $208 billion in 2020

queries.query: How much funding did USICA include to bolster domestic chip manufacturing?
gold_needles: $52 billion to bolster domestic chip manufacturing

queries.query: What were global semiconductor sales in 2020?
gold_needles: global sales in 2020 increased by 6.8 percent to $440.4 billion

queries.query: What percent of the global semiconductor market did the US industry hold, described as nearly half?
gold_needles: nearly half the global market share

queries.query: What percent of global semiconductor manufacturing capacity is in Asia?
gold_needles: Asia is home to about 75 percent of the world

queries.query: How many connected IoT devices were there in 2019?
gold_needles: numbered 22.6 billion in 2019 and are projected to grow to 75 billion by 2025
